src: Lucee is a high-performance, open-source CFML server written in Java. Supporting JDBC, Caching, Parallelism, HTTP, ORM, REST, S3 and dynamic Java integration, Lucee is great for developers aiming to build fast, scalable applications, delivering faster startup, rapid compilation and better runtime performance.
ja: Luceeは、Javaで書かれた高パフォーマンスなオープンソースのCFMLサーバー。JDBC、キャッシュ、並列処理、HTTP、ORM、REST、S3および動的Java統合をサポートし、高速でスケーラブルなアプリケーション構築を目指す開発者に最適
